en: It's just the two raptors, right?
ja: ラプターは2頭だけだよね？
vi: Chi co hai con raptor, dung khong?

en: You sure the third one's contained? Yes.
ko: 세 번째 녀석은 확실히 가둬놨지? 네.
ja: 3頭目は閉じ込められてる？はい
zhTW: 你確定第三隻被控制住了？是的
vi: Ban chac con thu ba bi nho lai chu? Vang

en: Unless they figured out how to open doors.
ja: ドアの開け方を学ばなければな
zhTW: 除非牠們學會了怎麼開門
vi: Tru khi chung da hoc cach mo cua
